tasks.subject: Task 1: PortEdge + PortAnchor
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Land foundational types with validation.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/NodiumGraph/Model/PortEdge.cs`
- Create: `src/NodiumGraph/Model/PortAnchor.cs`
- Create: `tests/NodiumGraph.Tests/PortAnchorTests.cs`

**Verify:** `dotnet test --filter "FullyQualifiedName~PortAnchorTests"`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/NodiumGraph/Model/PortEdge.cs","src/NodiumGraph/Model/PortAnchor.cs","tests/NodiumGraph.Tests/PortAnchorTests.cs"],"verifyCommand":"dotnet test --filter \"FullyQualifiedName~PortAnchorTests\"","acceptanceCriteria":["PortEdge enum exists","PortAnchor validates Edge","PortAnchor validates Fraction","Static helpers work","Value equality works"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: INodeShape extensions + Node forwarders + Shape null-guard
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Extend interface contract (default-throwing impls). Add Node forwarders, null-reject Shape setter.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/NodiumGraph/Model/INodeShape.cs`
- Modify: `src/NodiumGraph/Model/Node.cs`
- Modify: `tests/NodiumGraph.Tests/NodeTests.cs`

**Verify:** `dotnet build && dotnet test --filter "FullyQualifiedName~NodeTests"`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/NodiumGraph/Model/INodeShape.cs","src/NodiumGraph/Model/Node.cs","tests/NodiumGraph.Tests/NodeTests.cs"],"verifyCommand":"dotnet build && dotnet test --filter \"FullyQualifiedName~NodeTests\"","acceptanceCriteria":["INodeShape gets 3 methods with default throwers","Node has 4 forwarders","Shape setter rejects null and fires INPC"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: RectangleShape anchor impl + tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Implement anchor methods on `RectangleShape` per Section A's per-edge table.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/NodiumGraph/Model/RectangleShape.cs`
- Modify: `tests/NodiumGraph.Tests/RectangleShapeTests.cs`

**Verify:** `dotnet test --filter "FullyQualifiedName~RectangleShapeTests"`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/NodiumGraph/Model/RectangleShape.cs","tests/NodiumGraph.Tests/RectangleShapeTests.cs"],"verifyCommand":"dotnet test --filter \"FullyQualifiedName~RectangleShapeTests\"","acceptanceCriteria":["GetEdgePoint matches per-edge table","Cardinal normals","Canonical-corner InferAnchor","Round-trip","Zero-dim contract"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: EllipseShape anchor impl + tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Implement aspect-aware ellipse anchor methods.


tasks.subject: Task 5: RoundedRectangleShape anchor impl + tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Implement piecewise per-edge parameterization. Handle capsule cases per-edge.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/NodiumGraph/Model/RoundedRectangleShape.cs`
- Modify: `tests/NodiumGraph.Tests/RoundedRectangleShapeTests.cs`

**Verify:** `dotnet test --filter "FullyQualifiedName~RoundedRectangleShapeTests"`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/NodiumGraph/Model/RoundedRectangleShape.cs","tests/NodiumGraph.Tests/RoundedRectangleShapeTests.cs"],"verifyCommand":"dotnet test --filter \"FullyQualifiedName~RoundedRectangleShapeTests\"","acceptanceCriteria":["Per-edge flat = max(0, edgeLength - 2·rEff)","Radial normals on corner arcs","Corner-arc round-trip","Capsule per-edge correct","Zero-dim contract"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: TestNodes helper + migrate 22 test files
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Helper that wraps port construction (currently old `Point` ctor; updated in Task 7).

**Files:**
- Create: `tests/NodiumGraph.Tests/Helpers/TestNodes.cs`
- Modify: 22 test files (see plan)

**Verify:** `dotnet test && grep -rn "new Port(" tests/ --include="*.cs"` (only Helpers/TestNodes.cs)

```json:metadata
{"files":["tests/NodiumGraph.Tests/Helpers/TestNodes.cs"],"verifyCommand":"dotnet test","acceptanceCriteria":["TestNodes.PortAt exists","No raw new Port outside helper","All tests still pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Port + provider refactor (core API change)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Anchor-based `Port`; simplify providers; update `TestNodes` helper.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/NodiumGraph/Model/Port.cs`
- Modify: `src/NodiumGraph/Model/FixedPortProvider.cs`
- Modify: `src/NodiumGraph/Model/DynamicPortProvider.cs`
- Modify: `tests/NodiumGraph.Tests/Helpers/TestNodes.cs`
- Modify: `tests/NodiumGraph.Tests/PortTests.cs`
- Modify: `tests/NodiumGraph.Tests/FixedPortProviderTests.cs`
- Modify: `tests/NodiumGraph.Tests/DynamicPortProviderTests.cs`

**Verify:** `dotnet test`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/NodiumGraph/Model/Port.cs","src/NodiumGraph/Model/FixedPortProvider.cs","src/NodiumGraph/Model/DynamicPortProvider.cs","tests/NodiumGraph.Tests/Helpers/TestNodes.cs","tests/NodiumGraph.Tests/PortTests.cs","tests/NodiumGraph.Tests/FixedPortProviderTests.cs","tests/NodiumGraph.Tests/DynamicPortProviderTests.cs"],"verifyCommand":"dotnet test","acceptanceCriteria":["Port has only anchor ctor","Position derived","EmissionDirection property","INPC correct","FixedPortProvider simplified","DynamicPortProvider anchor-based","TestNodes updated"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Delete PortEmissionDirection; routers use port.EmissionDirection
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Remove static helper; switch routers; add ellipse-emission test.

**Files:**
- Delete: `src/NodiumGraph/Interactions/PortEmissionDirection.cs`
- Modify: routers + tests

**Verify:** `dotnet test && grep -rn "PortEmissionDirection" src/ tests/` (empty)

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/NodiumGraph/Interactions/BezierRouter.cs","src/NodiumGraph/Interactions/StepRouter.cs","src/NodiumGraph/Interactions/StraightRouter.cs"],"verifyCommand":"dotnet test","acceptanceCriteria":["PortEmissionDirection deleted","Routers use port.EmissionDirection","Ellipse emission test"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Canvas refactor — drop ILayoutAwarePortProvider; add W/H/Shape invalidation
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Delete the interface; add the W/H/Shape case in `OnNodePropertyChanged`.

**Files:**
- Delete: `src/NodiumGraph/Model/ILayoutAwarePortProvider.cs`
- Modify: `src/NodiumGraph/Controls/NodiumGraphCanvas.cs`
- Add: canvas resize-invalidation tests

**Verify:** `dotnet test && grep -rn "ILayoutAwarePortProvider|LayoutInvalidated|OnLayoutAwareProviderInvalidated" src/ tests/` (empty)

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/NodiumGraph/Controls/NodiumGraphCanvas.cs"],"verifyCommand":"dotnet test","acceptanceCriteria":["ILayoutAwarePortProvider deleted","Canvas wiring removed","W/H/Shape case added","Resize invalidation test","Shape-swap invalidation test"]}
```

tasks.description:
